files.name: main.py
files.content:
def läs_fil():
  with open("fil.txt", "r") as infil:
  	  all_text = infil.readlines()
  #Kommer stänga filen när detta körts klart
  return all_text
 
print(läs_fil())

files.name: fil.txt
files.content:
Limerick av Edward Lear:
There was an Old Man with a beard,
Who said, 'It is just as I feared!
Two Owls and a Hen,
Four Larks and a Wren, 
Have all built their nests in my beard!
